tasks: Create a 512 MiB swap partition on /dev/sdb.
Make the swap persistent across reboots.
hints: Use UUID or device path in /etc/fstab.
checks: swap_uuid="$(blkid -s UUID -o value /dev/sdb1)"; test -n "$swap_uuid" && swapon --show=NAME --noheadings | grep -qx /dev/sdb1 && awk -v dev="/dev/sdb1" -v uuid="$swap_uuid" '$1 !~ /^#/ && $2 == "swap" && $3 == "swap" && ($1 == dev || $1 == "UUID=" uuid || $1 == "/dev/disk/by-uuid/" uuid) {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Create a 512 MiB swap partition on /dev/sdb
Make the swap persistent across reboots
solution_commands: parted -s /dev/sdb mklabel gpt mkpart primary linux-swap 1MiB 513MiB
